name: pathly
description: Guided agent workflows for planning, building, reviewing, debugging, testing, and learning from software changes.

interface.shortDescription: Tell it what you want. Pathly chooses the path.
interface.longDescription: Pathly provides guided agent workflows for real software development: plan features, build in checkpoints, review changes, debug bugs, explore codebases, test results, and capture lessons.
